description:
Perform an XFoil direct analysis in QBlade for a NACA 0012 airfoil. Define a polar analysis with Reynolds Number 500,000, Mach 0, and NCrit 9. Run the analysis for Angle of Attack (Alpha) from -5° to 15° with a step of 0.5°. Export the polar data to /home/ga/Documents/polar_analysis_output.txt. Create a summary file at /home/ga/Documents/polar_summary.txt containing the maximum lift coefficient (Cl_max), minimum drag coefficient (Cd_min), and maximum lift-to-drag ratio (L/D_max) along with their corresponding alpha values in the following format:
Cl_max=<value> at alpha=<angle>
Cd_min=<value> at alpha=<angle>
L/D_max=<value> at alpha=<angle>
